channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Alzheimer's drug repairs DNA damage and reduces brain inflammation
item.description: A drug originally for spinal cord injury may offer a new approach to Alzheimer's, repairing DNA damage and reducing inflammation in mice.

item.title: Sugar-coated therapy boosted survival against deadly brain cancer by 50% in mice
item.description: An experimental treatment using sugar-coated particles helped bypass the blood-brain barrier, improving survival in mice with glioblastoma.

item.title: Camera developed to track invisible particles in three dimensions
item.description: A new particle detector, PLATON, may replace millions of tiny components with a single light-producing block. Using a light...

item.title: Sun-like star observed consuming one of its own planets
item.description: A distant Sun-like star appears to have devoured one of its planets, leaving a surprising chemical fingerprint. Researchers found an unusually ...
